title: ub is much slower in writing than usb-storage
description:
Distribution: mandrake 10.2 rc2 

Hardware Environment: desktop - Asus A7V133 motherboard - Athlon XP 1600 CPU 

Problem Description:

I have a 128Mb usb key drive. Writing to it is very slow with ub driver.
Yesterday, I tried to copy 16Mb to this drive then I issued a sync command to
unmount it. 11 (eleven) minutes later, I aborted it by rmmoding uhci_hcd. 

Using usb-storage instead of ub worked well. 

Steps to reproduce:

# modprobe ub 
(plug the usb key drive)
# mount -orw,nosuid,nodev,iocharset=iso8859-15,umask=0 /dev/uba1 /mnt/disk
# time sh -c " dd if=/dev/urandom of=/mnt/disk/blah bs=1k count=512 ; sync;" 
512+0 enregistrements lus.
512+0 enregistrements
